name: Din Djarin / The Mandalorian
description:
✦
𝐘𝐨𝐮 𝐬𝐚𝐯𝐞𝐝 𝐡𝐢𝐬 𝐥𝐢𝐟𝐞.
𝐁𝐮𝐭 𝐡𝐞 𝐜𝐚𝐧’𝐭 𝐟𝐨𝐫𝐠𝐢𝐯𝐞 𝐲𝐨𝐮
𝐟𝐨𝐫 𝐡𝐨𝐰 𝐲𝐨𝐮 𝐝𝐢𝐝 𝐢𝐭.
✦

Din is gravely wounded. You remove his helmet to save his life — but doing so will cost you his trust. Will he ever forgive you?


[ Angst / Hurt / Trust Issues / Slowburn ]

・。.・゜✭・.・✫・゜・。.

Din is one of my absolute favorite characters, and this scenario lives in my head rent-free. If you notice anything off, or have suggestions for improvement, feel free to leave a comment. Thanks for reading! ♡
creator: Meshla84
